subcodes.first_line: O servant of God, Aqa Mihdi is now present and declareth that his father's work exceedeth his own [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی آقا مهدی الان حاضر و میفرماید کار پدر از من بهتر است زیرا در
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort
